prompt: A majestic mystical horse stands silently amidst the dappled sunlight of a serene forest.
prompt_refined: Generate an artwork depicting a majestic mystical unicorn, specifically referencing the shape, pose, and lower-middle placement of the creature from image 1. The unicorn should be standing silently, slightly to the left of center, facing right. The scene is a serene, ancient forest filled with lush green foliage. Bright, dappled sunlight filters through the dense tree canopy, creating radiant patterns of light on the forest floor around the unicorn.
objects: Majestic mystical unicorn (with shape, pose, and lower-middle placement referencing image 1, standing silently, slightly to the left of center, facing right)
